name: DynaVap The BallR Cap
summary: Upgrade your DynaVap experience with the BallR Cap—an innovative enhancement designed for superior convection heating.
description: Upgrade your DynaVap experience with the BallR Cap—an innovative enhancement designed for superior convection heating. Featuring a perforated design that maximises airflow and heat distribution, this extended-length cap delivers smooth, flavorful vapour in every session. Built with high-quality stainless steel balls, the BallR Cap enhances heat retention for consistent performance, whether you're using a torch or an induction heater*. Engineered for seamless compatibility, it fits effortlessly onto any standard DynaVap tip, making it an essential upgrade for any vaping enthusiast. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
